input.text: I want a cruise but I only have about $1500 per person. What can I get?

expected: Agent should search for cruises within the $1500/person budget using the pricing sub-agent. Should present affordable options or explain what's available at that price point.

input.text: That's more limited than I expected. What if I go up to $2000?

expected: Agent should expand the search to the $2000/person range and show how the additional budget opens up more options. Should contrast with the previous $1500 results to highlight the value of the increase.

input.text: Are there any last-minute deals or off-season discounts?

expected: Agent should address discount and deal availability — last-minute sailings, shoulder season pricing, or promotional offers. Should stay within the budget-conscious framing of the conversation.

input.text: Show me the best value 5-day cruise you can find under $2000

expected: Agent should search with specific constraints (5-day, under $2000) and present the best value option, explaining why it's a good deal. Should use both search and pricing sub-agents.

input.text: What's included in that price and what costs extra?
input.context: User is asking about the cruise recommended in the previous turn.

expected: Agent should break down what's included (meals, entertainment, port fees) vs extras (excursions, drinks, spa, Wi-Fi) for the selected cruise from the previous turn. Should maintain context of the specific cruise discussed.
